title.en: China-to-Philippines Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power tool documentation against Philippine requirements: PNS IEC 62841 safety standards, BPS PS or ICC mark under DTI where a tool is in scope, NTC type approval for cordless radio modules, EMC expectations, and importer and labelling obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具文件与菲律宾要求差距对照：PNS IEC 62841安全标准、在适用范围内由DTI下属BPS签发的PS或ICC标志、无线电模块的NTC型号核准、EMC要求及进口商和标签义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具文件與菲律賓要求差距對照：PNS IEC 62841安全標準、在適用範圍內由DTI下屬BPS簽發的PS或ICC標誌、無線電模組的NTC型號核准、EMC要求及進口商和標籤義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BPS scope determination, ICC or PS licence approval, NTC type-approval determination, customs classification, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Philippine technical regulations, PNS standards, BPS and DTI procedures, NTC rules, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BPS适用范围裁定、ICC或PS许可批准、NTC型号核准裁定、海关归类或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行菲律宾技术法规、PNS标准、BPS与DTI程序、NTC规则及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BPS適用範圍裁定、ICC或PS許可批准、NTC型號核准裁定、海關歸類或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行菲律賓技術法規、PNS標準、BPS與DTI程序、NTC規則及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For power tools exported from China to the Philippines, do not assume Chinese GB/T evidence or a CCC mark carries over. The defensible starting point is to confirm whether the specific tool falls under a Philippine mandatory product certification scheme administered by the Bureau of Philippine Standards under DTI; where it does, obtain a PS licence for local manufacture or an Import Commodity Clearance for imports against the relevant PNS, usually adopting IEC 62841. Treat 230 V 60 Hz mains compatibility, EMC, NTC type approval for any cordless radio module, an in-country importer, and Philippine labelling as separate obligations.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动工具出口菲律宾时，不应假定中国GB/T证据或CCC标志可直接沿用。稳妥的起点是核实具体工具是否落入由DTI下属菲律宾标准局管理的强制产品认证范围；若属于，则需依据相关PNS标准（通常采用IEC 62841）取得本地制造的PS许可或进口的进口商品清关（ICC）。应将230V 60Hz电网兼容性、EMC、任何无线电模块的NTC型号核准、在地进口商及菲律宾标签视为独立义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動工具出口菲律賓時，不應假定中國GB/T證據或CCC標誌可直接沿用。穩妥的起點是核實具體工具是否落入由DTI下屬菲律賓標準局管理的強制產品認證範圍；若屬於，則需依據相關PNS標準（通常採用IEC 62841）取得本地製造的PS許可或進口的進口商品清關（ICC）。應將230V 60Hz電網相容性、EMC、任何無線電模組的NTC型號核准、在地進口商及菲律賓標籤視為獨立義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true.
